title: Blood pressure screening
specialty: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports documenting measured severe blood pressure plus assessed retinal, neurological, chest-pain, heart-failure, kidney-injury, or phaeochromocytoma features as prompts, never as automatic conclusions.
examination.rationale: Supports clinician-entered severe-hypertension warning context for blood pressure screening; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports documenting measured severe blood pressure plus assessed retinal, neurological, chest-pain, heart-failure, kidney-injury, or phaeochromocytoma features as prompts, never as automatic conclusions.

source.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.5.1-1.5.3 - severe hypertension and same-day specialist review features

investigations.text: Supports validated and maintained devices, standardized measurement conditions, appropriate cuff size, pulse review, and clinician-recorded postural measurements.
investigations.rationale: Supports measurement technique, device and postural context for blood pressure screening; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports validated and maintained devices, standardized measurement conditions, appropriate cuff size, pulse review, and clinician-recorded postural measurements.

source.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1-1.1.8 - training, device maintenance, measurement technique, and postural assessment

investigations.text: Supports documenting repeated clinic readings, ABPM or HBPM source and averages, result context, annual measurement in relevant diabetes care, and clinician review without automatically diagnosing hypertension.
investigations.rationale: Supports clinic, ambulatory and home blood-pressure assessment context for blood pressure screening; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting repeated clinic readings, ABPM or HBPM source and averages, result context, annual measurement in relevant diabetes care, and clinician review without automatically diagnosing hypertension.

source.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1-1.2.13 - clinic, ambulatory, and home blood-pressure assessment

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, indication, preparation, device, cuff, arm, readings, position, symptoms, prior values, interpretation and clinician plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for blood pressure screening.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
